news.title: Energy Infrastructure Stock Targa Resources Teases A Breakout
news.summary: Top-rated energy infrastructure stock Targa Resources flirted with a breakout on Monday.  Also on Monday, Barclays analyst Theresa Chen said that Targa stock remains well positioned to benefit from "resilient" Permian basin growth.  Drivers for that performance include the U.S.-Iran war and the nation's push to power data centers with natural gas.

news.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Close Lower As Oil Prices Spike; This Memory ETF In Bear Market
news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes finished in the red Monday, hurt by surging oil prices as President Donald Trump said the U.S. will reinstate a blockade of Iran in the Strait of Hormuz.  Meanwhile, memory-chip maker SK Hynix sank and an exchange traded fund focused on memory producers turned bearish on the stock market today.
